title: Disappearing duplicated activity and subitems
excerpt: Hi there. I have the ability to duplicate an activity and its subitems (I think) but then I can’t find the duplicated items to add to my board. I’ve tried several times and receive the “We successfully duplicated 1 item.…

posts.author: erinforthewin (Erin Kupcak)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there. I have the ability to duplicate an activity and its subitems (I think) but then I can’t find the duplicated items to add to my board. I’ve tried several times and receive the “We successfully duplicated 1 item.” message. Any help is appreciated.
